home.subtitle: Your four-board life system, in one place.

inspiredActions.footer: Small daily actions keep your boards and plan coherent.

trial.confirmBody: This ends your free trial and starts your paid Premium subscription immediately, charging your payment method today. You'll gain access to downloads/printing.
trial.success: Trial ended — your subscription is now active.
trial.error: Could not end your trial. Please try again.

boards.title: Vision
boards.description: Vision boards with drag-and-drop editing — focus, mood, and The Plan

yourJourney.title: Reminders
yourJourney.description: Email reminders, journal, and weekly progress

journey.journalDescription: Reflect and capture what shifted this week.

projects.title: Your Projects
projects.subtitle: Jump back into a set you've already started or start a new one.
projects.empty: No sets yet — start your first set above.
projects.deleteDescription: “{{name}}” and all its boards will be removed. This can't be undone.

library.heading: Library
library.lead: Short reads with swatches, visuals, and plotting ideas.

community.title: Community
community.feedSubtitle: Team updates, featured setups, and poll winners — curated here only.
community.dailyPromptsHint: Reflection starters — reply via Submit your setup, not in the feed.
community.emptyFeed: Nothing published yet — check back soon.
community.imageTypeError: Please choose an image file (JPG, PNG, WebP, HEIC).
community.submitLead: Share your vision board rebrand, moodboard, or org setup for review. Submissions do not appear in the feed until we feature them.
community.titlePlaceholder: Spring rebrand wall, WFH desk reset…
community.storyPlaceholder: What changed, what you are plotting next, anything we should know when reviewing…
community.featureOptInHint: We may showcase your setup in the feed, a poll, or monthly spotlights (e.g. free month for best setup). You can decline later by emailing support.
community.submitted: Submitted — we will review it separately from the feed.
community.bodyTooShort: Add a bit more detail (at least 10 characters).

create.prompt: What do you want to create today?
create.placeholder: A calm home office, a vision board for spring, a kanban for the launch…

imageLibrary.title: Your Images
imageLibrary.subtitle: Browse Our Collection, Affixements, Found Objects, or upload to Your Library — each with its own tab.

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Your orders and their status.
orders.empty: No orders yet. Purchases you make will show up here.

locked.createBody: Plotting boards, companion, structures, and clippings unlock with palette plotting Premium.
locked.journeyBody: Plan reminders, progress tracking, and journal unlock with palette plotting Premium.
locked.newBoardBody: Start a new board on the plotting desk once you are on Premium — Library stays free.
locked.imageLibraryBody: Upload and organize clippings here once you are on Premium.
locked.projectsBody: Your saved boards live here once you're on Premium — Library stays free.
